long_description:
NRE were alerted of link flaps between bas10b.sr01.tok04 Et5/1 <-> bcs104a.sr01.tok04 Et52/1. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19712
short_description: bas10b.sr01.tok04 Et5/1 <-> bcs104a.sr01.tok04 Et52/1 | Link Flap
close_notes: Link shut to mitigate any further impact. Will proceed to do Layer1 troubleshooting to resolve any issues with the link before adding it back to service. (Note: This incident was resolved via automation.)
